gate_assessments.gate_reason: Buy Box 90d Low is below estimated break-even floor (price downside risk).
gate_assessments.cited_evidence: The 90d low of $19.52 at verified_facts.bb_90d.low is not present in the visible history per verified_facts.bb_90d.low_present_in_history being false. The visible 30d history shows a minimum of $31.49 at verified_facts.history_30d.low which recovered within 248 minutes per evt_001.recovery_minutes. The ROI at the visible history low is 8.59% per verified_facts.profitability.roi_at_history_30d_low, indicating the product has recovered well above the historical anomaly.

llm1_output.reasoning: The 90d low at verified_facts.bb_90d.low occurred outside visible history and appears to be an anomaly given the stable $31-37 range shown in verified_facts.history_30d with rapid recovery per evt_001.recovery_minutes. Low competition at verified_facts.competition.fba_sellers_near_bb of 1 seller with weighted stock of 18.8 reduces risk significantly.

failures.reason: value in cited_evidence does not match resolved value
